name_en: Top-tier Original Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷 M82582 Monogram
name_cn:
Top-tier Original Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷 M82582 Monogram
This Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, opening with a smooth snap button. It includes an interior slip pocket, a zip coin pocket, card slots, and a back slip pocket.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm
